name: Mitchells & Butlers PLC
description: UK's leading operator of managed pubs and restaurants with ~1,700 sites. Brands include All Bar One, Harvester, Toby Carvery, Miller & Carter, Nicholson's. 83% freehold estate. No dividend — securitisation covenants restrict payments.

assumptions.revenueDrivers: Revenue £2,711m in FY2025 (+3.9%). ~1,718 sites. Like-for-like sales growth. Premium dining brands (Miller & Carter) outperforming. Germany (44 Alex bars).
assumptions.marginDrivers: Adjusted operating margin 12.2% in FY2025 (up from 4.3% in COVID-impacted FY2021). Strong margin recovery. 83% freehold estate provides cost advantage.
assumptions.risks: Net debt £843m non-lease (£1,277m inc. leases, 2.7x EBITDA). No dividends — securitisation covenants restrict payments. NIC and wage inflation headwinds. Consumer spending pressure. Energy costs.
assumptions.catalyst: Continued deleveraging. Freehold estate worth multiples of market cap. Margin expansion from operational improvements. Estate optimisation (openings/closures). Potential dividend reinstatement as covenants ease.
